notes: v1.14.73 - Removed the dead #vaBtn floating push-to-talk remnant (its HTML element was dropped in a prior refactor; voice is fully served by the .qa-voice quick-action). The SpeechRecognition engine and live voice path (vaStart/openVaSheet/vaAsk/setVaBody/.qa-voice) are untouched. Deferred trivia: 3 grouped .va-btn selector fragments + the net-gate-adjacent offline .va-btn rules (harmless dead selectors).
